prestazioni: Engine: EJ255 (closed-deck, semi-forged internals) with a Tomei 260° duration camshaft kit (intake: 260°, exhaust: 260°, 10.5mm lift) paired with Tomei Type-M 1.1mm head gaskets for increased compression (10.5:1) and reinforced valve springs to handle 8,500 RPM safely.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer) with a custom 3-inch divorced wastegate dump tube routed into a Tomei 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system (catless downpipe, single muffler exit). Supporting mods include a Cobb Tuning Big SF intake, IAG Competition Series intercooler (10-row, 2.5-inch core), and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines.

Drivetrain: PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset (1st: 2.97, 2nd: 2.15, 3rd: 1.63, 4th: 1.26, 5th: 1.00, 6th: 0.84) with a Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way limited-slip differential (250Nm torque capacity) and a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch (ceramic-metallic friction, 800Nm clamping force).
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny V1 Legacy Wagon widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and OEM-style JDM Subaru Legacy B4 GT-B side decals (white outline).

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 front / 18x10.5 +45 rear (matte gunmetal finish) with Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) and DBA 5000 Series two-piece rotors (355mm front, 330mm rear) with AP Racing CP6640 calipers.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Takata 4-point harnesses, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a Defi BF Advance multi-gauge pod (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on a custom carbon fiber A-pillar.
